summary: Iter27 (pasos 5-9 pre-launch checklist) testing completed. All 24 unit tests pass. Frontend pages /changelog, /privacy, /terms verified accessible without auth with correct testids and content. Footer link 'Novedades' on /inicio works and navigates to /changelog. bcrypt 4.0.1 pinned correctly with __about__ attribute present (no new warnings after pin); legacy warnings exist in old log files from before the pin was applied. Welcome email hook integrated in onboarding/auto-setup wrapped in try/except (best-effort). Locustfile is syntactically valid and contains required PublicVisitor + AuthenticatedTenant classes. Regression endpoints (/api/health, /api/health/ping with X-Request-ID, /api/leads, /api/auth/tenant/branding, /api/tenant/features-showcase) all return 200.
critical_code_review_comments: Old bcrypt warnings still in /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log/out.log from before the pin (timestamps prior to last reload). After current bcrypt==4.0.1 pin, no new __about__ warnings on fresh logins — consider rotating or truncating logs in deploy to start clean.

Welcome email hook in /app/backend/routers/onboarding.py L317-329 uses business_name as admin_name fallback when no admin name is provided, which is acceptable but may produce slightly awkward greetings (e.g., 'Hola Acme SA'). Consider using request payload's admin contact name if available.
Locustfile has hardcoded path defaults (LOAD_TEST_EMAIL=demo@inmobot.com) — fine for preview but ensure prod runs override via env so demo creds aren't exercised against production.
test_credentials: admin@inmobot.com/Admin123! and demo@inmobot.com/Demo123! verified working (login returns access_token).
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded admin and demo tenant.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pasos 5-9 del checklist pre-lanzamiento verificados al 100%. Para correr tests backend con env: `cd /app/backend && export $(grep -v '^#' .env | grep -v 'SMTP_FROM_NAME' | xargs -d '\n') && export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://inmobot-preview.preview.emergentagent.com && pytest tests/test_iter27_welcome_bcrypt_locust.py tests/test_iter26_structured_logging.py -v`. Sistema listo para deploy a producción salvo pasos 10-11 que requieren API keys reales del usuario.
